template_data.quote_html: Your GSA price isn't a bid. It's a ceiling you'll live with for years.
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic pull-quote layout. Cream/off-white background with a thin dark navy border frame. Center: large bold serif quote text in dark navy reading 'YOUR PRICE IS YOUR CEILING'. Below the quote, a short 2-word label 'BASIS OF AWARD' in small caps with a thin horizontal rule above it. Upper left corner: small muted grey label 'FIELD NOTE'. Upper right corner: label 'No. 004 · PRICING' in small caps. Bottom third: illustrated professional in business casual reviewing a contract at a desk, looking focused and analytical. A small red warning icon near a line item on the document. Dark navy accent stripe at very bottom. Footer text: 'Jason · GSA Focus'.
